name_en: Coach CU715 July SoftTabby New Arrival Mid-season Sale The Tabby series is a classic cornerstone of Coach, continuing the SoftTabby soft leather craftsmanship that is comfortable and soft to wear. Punk-style rivet elements are added. Crossbody. Size 26/16.
